hero.headline: Professional Cleaning in Bratislava
hero.subheadline: Reliable, thorough, and fairly priced. We take care of your home so you can focus on what matters.

regular.title: Apartment Cleaning
regular.description: Regular or one-time cleaning for 1 to 6+ room apartments. Includes all rooms, kitchen, and bathroom.

windows.title: Window Cleaning
windows.description: Professional cleaning of all window types — from standard to panoramic and shopfronts.

additional.title: Additional Services
additional.description: Special cleaning beyond standard service — ovens, fridges, ironing, and more.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Three simple steps to a clean home

1.title: Choose a Service
1.description: Use the calculator to select services and get an estimated price.

2.title: Send a Request
2.description: Fill in the contact form with your date and address. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

3.title: We Clean
3.description: Our team arrives at the agreed time and takes care of your home.

calculator.sectionSubtitle: Get an estimate for our services
calculator.windowsLabel: Select window types and enter quantities
calculator.disclaimer: Final price depends on apartment size, degree of soiling, number of shelves, and other factors.
calculator.noVat: * Prices exclude VAT. We are not VAT registered.
calculator.nothingSelected: Please select at least one item

contact.sectionSubtitle: Send us a request and we'll get back to you within 24 hours

placeholders.name: John Smith
placeholders.message: Tell us anything we should know...

contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us by phone.
contact.note: * Free delivery within Bratislava. Parking costs covered by the client.
contact.trustNote: We respond to every request within 24 hours. Free delivery within Bratislava.
